tasks.label: PCA: Copilot Framework Proposal
args: Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:4173/api/framework-proposal' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"runtimeProvider":"copilot","mode":"discuss","decision":"TRHS interpretation strategy","objective":"Create objective-driven interpretation plan","context":"Use public dataset evidence","expectations":"Defensible recommendation\nCoverage metrics","constraints":"Public data only","researchNeeds":"Find contradictory clauses\nFind latest regulatory updates","activeSearchEnabled":true,"sources":"data/public-pdf-text","policy":"strict","maxCycles":3}' | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: PCA: Copilot Research Pack
args: Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:4173/api/research-pack' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"runtimeProvider":"copilot","mode":"verify","decision":"TRHS interpretation strategy","objective":"Create objective-driven interpretation plan","context":"Use public dataset evidence","researchNeeds":"Find contradictory clauses\nFind latest regulatory updates","activeSearchEnabled":true,"sources":"data/public-pdf-text","policy":"strict","maxFiles":120}' | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8

tasks.label: PCA: Copilot Live Debate (1 cycle smoke)
args: Invoke-WebRequest -Method Post -Uri 'http://localhost:4173/api/debate-live' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"runtimeProvider":"copilot","mode":"verify","decision":"TRHS interpretation strategy","context":"Cross-document support and contradiction review","sources":"data/public-pdf-text","policy":"strict","cycles":1}' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode
